since_last: 33% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.88%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.60% · BTC -0.78% · Gold -0.61% · Nasdaq100 -2.06%. 33% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.88%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.88%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.48%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -11.68%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.57%, WDAY +3.86%, INTU +3.64%, IBM +3.39%, META +3.33%. Laggards: TER -11.68%, AMBA -10.95%, INTC -10.92%, MRVL -9.56%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.28% at $150.34
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.28% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
